briefs.title: Port Property Tax Designations Updated for 2026 — Two BC Marine Terminals Named
briefs.summary: BC updated its list of eligible port properties for the 2026 tax year, naming Alliance Grain Terminal and PKM Canada Marine Terminal Limited Partnership as the designated properties assessed as of December 31, 2025.

key_dates.label: BC Eligible Port Property Designation — 2026 taxation year takes effect
